case_title: REYNOLDS, SCOTT vs. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYNOLDS, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY DOES 1 TO V SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-08-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-09-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-18-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-08-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-08-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR NOV-07-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-07-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-07-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT. FAILURE TO APPEAR AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE WILL RESULT IN DISMISSAL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-02-1996 CONTINUED FROM NOV-07-1996 TO DEC-05-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-05-1996, OFF CALENDAR
